title: Bridge Essay: The Impact of Kundalini Yoga on Cognitive Function and Memory: A Systematic Revi

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Heat/Fire** (Phase 3) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Heat/Fire to mechanistic neuroscience through The, Impact, of, Kundalini, Yoga.

**The Impact of Kundalini Yoga on Cognitive Function and Memory: A Systematic Review of Randomized Controlled Trials.** — Cureus. PMID: 39070487. DOI: 10.7759/cureus.63161. Cognitive decline and dementia are significant public health challenges influenced by various modifiable and non-modifiable risk factors. Kundalini yoga (KY) has emerged as apromising non-pharmacological intervention to enhance cognitive function and memory in older adults at risk of cognitive decline. This systematic review aims to evaluate the effects of KY on cognitive function, memory impairment, and related neurobiological and psychological outcomes in older adults. Acomprehensive literat
